programme.title: Carlton Blues vs Richmond Tigers
programme.desc: The Blues and Tigers face off in Round 1.

programme.title: Essendon Bombers vs Hawthorn Hawks
programme.desc: The Bombers take on the Hawks in Round 1.

programme.title: Western Bulldogs vs Greater Western Sydney Giants
programme.desc: The Bulldogs host the Giants in Round 1.

programme.title: Collingwood Magpies vs Adelaide Crows
programme.desc: The Pies take on the Crows in Round 1.

programme.title: North Melbourne Kangaroos vs Port Adelaide Power
programme.desc: The Roos take on the Power in Round 1.

programme.title: Gold Coast Suns vs West Coast Eagles
programme.desc: The Suns host the Eagles to wrap up Round 1.

programme.title: Warriors vs Canberra
programme.desc: Watch Round 2 of the NRL on Kayo.

programme.title: Wests Tigers vs North Queensland
programme.desc: Watch Round 2 of the NRL on Kayo.

programme.title: St George Illawarra vs Melbourne
programme.desc: Watch Round 2 of the NRL on Kayo.

programme.title: Penrith vs Cronulla
programme.desc: Watch Round 2 of the NRL on Kayo.

programme.title: Dolphins vs Gold Coast Titans
programme.desc: Watch Round 2 of the NRL on Kayo.

programme.title: Geelong Cats vs Fremantle Dockers
programme.desc: The Cats host the Dockers in Round 1.

programme.title: Sydney Swans vs Brisbane Lions
programme.desc: The Swans host the Lions in Round 1.

programme.title: Melbourne Demons vs St Kilda Saints
programme.desc: The Dees host the Saints in Round 1.

programme.title: Mavericks vs Giants Netball
programme.desc: The 2026 SSN season kicks off with the Mavericks hosting the Giants at Red Energy Stadium, Bendigo.

programme.title: Adelaide Thunderbirds vs NSW Swifts
programme.desc: The Swifts are looking to bounce back after a disappointing finals series last season, they travel to Adelaide to take on the Thunderbirds.

programme.title: Queensland Firebirds vs Melbourne Vixens
programme.desc: The Vixens begin their quest to go back-to-back as they travel to Queensland to take on last year's wooden spooners at Nissan Arena.

programme.title: West Coast Fever vs Sunshine Coast Lightning
programme.desc: After a heartbreaking grand final loss the Fever will be out for revenge as they begin their season hosting the Lightning at RAC Arena.
